data.content: Implementation review approved. Reviewed branch `codex/5ca2-stale-dispatch-helper` at commit `394b90684fea2b728581a9581bfe26c130f89d97` against `origin/main`. The dialog no longer renders raw `defaultError` text, the review enablement path still depends on explicit `agentId` selection, and `settings=dispatch` opens the existing settings sheet on the Dispatch tab. Coverage includes settings URL parsing; full lint, typecheck, test, build, and Playwright smoke passed. No regressions or invariant violations found.
